model.label: DeepSeek V3.2
model.description: DeepSeek • General-purpose V-series model optimized for reasoning, coding, and efficient inference.

pick.rationale: Purdue's top-ranked offense, which leads the nation in adjusted efficiency, provides a significant advantage against Gonzaga's stout defense. While Gonzaga's defensive prowess could keep the game close, Purdue's ability to score consistently and exploit Gonzaga's relatively weaker offense should prevail. The Boilermakers' experience in high-stakes Big Ten games also gives them an edge in this Sweet 16 matchup.

reasoningStep.title: West Region Sweet 16: Purdue vs. Gonzaga
reasoningStep.summary: Evaluated efficiency ratings, team records, and matchup specifics, concluding that Purdue's elite offense and balanced profile overcome Gonzaga's defensive strength.
reasoningStep.evidence: Purdue ranks 8th overall with the best offense (adjoe rank 1) and defense rank 36; Gonzaga ranks 11th with a top-9 defense but offense rank 37. Purdue's 26-8 record includes a tougher schedule (SOS rank 5 vs. Gonzaga's 86), and no major injuries were found. Prior tournament wins show both teams are in form, but Purdue's offensive firepower is decisive.
